metadata.title: Why Meezan Bank | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: We are Pakistan’s first and largest dedicated Islamic bank and one of the fastest growing financial institutions in the banking sector of the country. Our success over the years is the result of our dedicated approach to nurture and develop our human resource, whom we consider to be an integral asset our organization.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Careers Why Meezan Bank Life at Meezan Bank If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Who Are We? We are Pakistan’s first and largest dedicated Islamic bank and one of the fastest growing financial institutions in the banking sector of the country. Our success over the years is the result of our dedicated approach to nurture and develop our human resource, whom we consider to be an integral asset of our organization. We strive to conduct our business to the highest standards guided by the principles of Shariah and our Vision. Everything we do reflects this and this is the essence of who we are as a brand. Vision, Mission & Values Vision Establish Islamic banking as banking of first choice to facilitate the implementation of an equitable economic system, providing a strong foundation for establishing a fair and just society for mankind. Mission To be a premier Islamic bank, offering a one-stop shop for innovative value-added products and services to our customers within the bounds of Shariah, while optimizing the stakeholders value through an organizational culture based on learning, fairness, respect for individual enterprise and performance. Values Shariah-compliance, Integrity, Service Excellence, Digitalization. Defined Career Path – Thrive, Learn, Grow, Prosper Meaningful learning path for employees with opportunities to grow Enriched culture Continuous mentorship which helps our talent raise the bar every day Exclusive Benefits Our benefit plan offers a complete package for employees, to keep them healthy, financially stable and also to keep them motivated. It includes Pick and drop facility for our employees as well as our interns Medical coverage for as well as their spouse and children Financing facility to stabilize the needs and to safeguard the dependents against any incidents Flexible leave policy comprising of 30 days Paid maternity leave in addition to annual leaves Subsidized lunch Club membership Learn and Earn Professional training and accreditation is an important part of any career and Meezan Bank is very keen on encouraging its staff to obtain additional qualifications along with monetary rewards. The Institute of Bankers Pakistan’s (IBP) Junior Associate ship of IBP (JAIBP) qualification Staff trainings arranged by Internal Staff Competitive Package Attractive salary package along with a multitude of on-job benefits Annual Bonus which is by far the best as compared to our competitors Numerous incentives through regular promotional activities Training & Development At Meezan Bank, we aim to provide an environment that facilitates: Productivity with healthy competition among the employees Vigorous and continuous learning, training and coaching programs that helps our employees to enhance their skill set and knowledge Internship Our Internship Program contributes towards the development of talented students by providing them an opportunity for industrial exposure through various internships programs which includes: Summer Internship Program PMYBL Program ACCA Trainees Program Regular Internships Continuous Growth Meezan Bank is dedicated Islamic bank with: A network of over 1000 online branches across the country First-ever Islamic commercial banking license by the State Bank of Pakistan Recognition as 'Best Islamic Bank in Pakistan' by numerous local and international institutions 'Best Islamic Bank for Treasury Management’ in the world award for 2016 by Islamic Finance News (IFN) Second Most Innovative Islamic Bank - Global Finance News (IFN) What makes Meezan Bank the best workplace to work at? Defined Career Path Exclusive Benefits Learn and Earn Competitive Package Training and Development Internship Continuous Growth MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
